description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design. The exterior is primarily white with large windows and subtle wooden accents around the window frames. The house features a spacious tiled patio area, which includes an outdoor dining set shaded by an umbrella and a rectangular swimming pool. There are several trees and potted plants around the property, adding greenery and a sense of privacy. The main entrance is sheltered and leads directly onto the patio, with large glass doors providing access to the interior. The overall layout is open and functional, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a tiled patio, outdoor dining area, and a swimming pool, surrounded by trees and plants.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio with dining set, umbrella, and swimming pool, with a large tree to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, patio furniture, and two trees, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and more windows, with trees and plants visible around the perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio furniture, and trees, with the house's flat roof and clean lines prominent.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no steps, sheltered by a small overhang, and directly connected to the patio.
